testcase.name: PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 · adversarial › 连点: triple-click login CTA → only 1 request fires (debounce guard)
PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 · adversarial › 注入/超长: 1000-char email + XSS script tag in password → no crash, graceful error
PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 · adversarial › SQL注入: email = SQL payload → backend rejects gracefully (no 500)
PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 · adversarial › 阻断: abort inflight request → 网络不可用 error
PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 · SQL Injection Adversarial › SQL 注入 email: a' OR '1'='1 必须被参数化 query 拦下
PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 · SQL Injection Adversarial › SQL 注入 password: ' OR 1=1 -- 必须被 bcrypt verify 拒绝
PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 · SQL Injection Adversarial › SQL 注入 LIKE wildcard: %@example.com 不应模糊匹配其他账号
PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 · P00 login (4 cases) › PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 happy: test@example.com + Test@1234 → /home
PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 · P00 login (4 cases) › PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 wrong_password → inline 邮箱或密码错误
PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 · P00 login (4 cases) › PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 wrong_email → same 邮箱或密码错误 (prevent enumeration)
PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 · P00 login (4 cases) › PHASE-A-LOGIN-H5 lockout: 5 connectives wrong → 账号已锁定 · 5 分钟后重试
SC-00-T01 · ADVERSARIAL · 破坏性边界 › ADV-1 · /s/<deeplink> + valid local JWT → stub 页直接渲染 · BootstrapGate 跳过
SC-00-T01 · ADVERSARIAL · 破坏性边界 › ADV-2 · resolve schema 篡改 (decision="WTF") → zod reject + fallback /welcome
SC-00-T01 · ADVERSARIAL · 破坏性边界 › ADV-3 · resolve 慢响应 6s → 5s timeout → 无 JWT fallback /welcome
SC-00-T01 · ADVERSARIAL · 破坏性边界 › ADV-4 · JWT 前缀篡改 → decodeJwt 抛 → 当本地无 JWT 处理 → 调后端
SC-00-T01 · resolve-entry · bootstrap decision tree dispatch › TC-00-A · jwt_local_valid_no_resolve_call → /home AND 0 backend call
SC-00-T01 · resolve-entry · bootstrap decision tree dispatch › TC-00-B · no_jwt_resolve_returns_landing → /welcome (真后端打通)
SC-00-T01 · resolve-entry · bootstrap decision tree dispatch › TC-00-C · jwt_expired_resolve_returns_login → /auth/login?redirect=...
SC-00-T01 · resolve-entry · bootstrap decision tree dispatch › TC-00-D · resolve_500_offline_with_stale_jwt → /home (stale tolerance)
SC-00-T03 · P00 deeplink redirect roundtrip (5 cases) › TC-00.03 (a) redirect_query_renders_hint: ?redirect=/review/exec/123 → hint visible · text contains path-only (脱敏)
SC-00-T03 · P00 deeplink redirect roundtrip (5 cases) › TC-00.03 (b) no_redirect_no_hint: /auth/login (无 query) → hint DOM 不存在
SC-00-T03 · P00 deeplink redirect roundtrip (5 cases) › TC-00.03 (c) login_success_replaces_to_redirect: 正确密码 → router.replace(/review/exec/123)
SC-00-T03 · P00 deeplink redirect roundtrip (5 cases) › TC-00.03 (d) login_failure_keeps_redirect: 错密码 → URL ?redirect= 保留 · error 可见
SC-00-T03 · P00 deeplink redirect roundtrip (5 cases) › TC-00.03 (e) open_redirect_blocked: 外域 + javascript: + data: + // → 一律 fallback /home + console.warn
SC-00-T04 · Adversarial · 探索性边界 (3 cases) › TC-00-T04-ADV (a) timeout_800ms_triggers_degradation: 1500ms 延迟 · stale JWT · abort 后落 /home + banner
SC-00-T04 · Adversarial · 探索性边界 (3 cases) › TC-00-T04-ADV (b) no_jwt_5xx_falls_to_welcome: 无 JWT + resolve 500 → /welcome (NOT /home, NOT /auth/login)
SC-00-T04 · Adversarial · 探索性边界 (3 cases) › TC-00-T04-ADV (c) stub_token_path_param_in_telemetry: /s/abc123 → anon_stub_view 的 token_hash 是 djb2 hash 非明文
SC-00-T04 · stub 兜底真页 + 离线降级真 UI (6 cases) › TC-00-T04 (a) shared_stub_renders: /s/abc123 → stub UI visible · /api/share/* count===0
SC-00-T04 · stub 兜底真页 + 离线降级真 UI (6 cases) › TC-00-T04 (b) welcomeback_stub_renders: /welcome-back → stub UI · device-refresh + 二次 resolve count===0
SC-00-T04 · stub 兜底真页 + 离线降级真 UI (6 cases) › TC-00-T04 (c) observer_stub_renders: /observer/ABC123 → stub UI · /api/observer/* count===0
SC-00-T04 · stub 兜底真页 + 离线降级真 UI (6 cases) › TC-00-T04 (d) stub_cta_redirects_to_login: shared stub CTA click → URL pathname === /auth/login
SC-00-T04 · stub 兜底真页 + 离线降级真 UI (6 cases) › TC-00-T04 (e) offline_banner_with_stale_jwt: resolve 5xx + stale JWT → /home + banner visible · 文字 "离线模式"
SC-00-T04 · stub 兜底真页 + 离线降级真 UI (6 cases) › TC-00-T04 (f) offline_banner_close_persists: close → hidden · reload + 仍 5xx → banner 不再出现
SC-11-T01 · P-LANDING shell (5 cases) › TC-11-T01 (a) loading_skeleton_then_ready: race-free allSettled · skeleton → samples section
SC-11-T01 · P-LANDING shell (5 cases) › TC-11-T01 (b) samples_5xx_falls_to_degraded_state: 500 · banner visible · samples 区缺失
SC-11-T01 · P-LANDING shell (5 cases) › TC-11-T01 (c) kpi_5xx_partial_degraded: kpi 500 · kpi-bar absent · samples 正常
SC-11-T01 · P-LANDING shell (5 cases) › TC-11-T01 (d) no_auth_no_resolve_calls: 匿名访问 · /api/auth/* + /api/session/resolve count===0
SC-11-T01 · P-LANDING shell (5 cases) › TC-11-T01 (e) cdn_cache_headers: samples response · Cache-Control + Vary headers (CDN 强缓存)
